note: SUGGESTED capability tags for methodology steps. These are recommendations only — a step's `tags` may use any of these, a tweaked variant, or a brand-new tag you invent. The engine is tag-agnostic and never checks membership here. `typical_requires` is a starting point for the step's `requires` block (a `decide`-style waist), not a rule.

items.hint: Fan out: run a council per persona/idea/angle and record_node each. A diverge cloud.
Affinity-cluster upstream explorations into themes/key-problems. A converge variant.
Consolidate a fan into one decision node (POV / shortlist / spec / presentation).
Scaffold real artifact(s) of produces.artifact_type (e.g. a prototype, survey, journey-map).
Personas USE an artifact (a real session, e.g. via the Playwright harness) → grounded reactions.
Second-order report / solution presentation over upstream nodes (the project report).
